message:
rename: wezterm_automata/wa → frankenterm/ft

Complete project rebrand from WezTerm Automata (wa) to FrankenTerm (ft):

- Repo: wezterm_automata → frankenterm
- Binary: wa → ft
- Main crate: wa → frankenterm
- Core lib: wa-core → frankenterm-core
- Fuzz crate: wa-fuzz → frankenterm-fuzz
- 14 wezterm-* crates → frankenterm-* (names + dir paths)
- Env vars: WA_* → FT_* (40+ variables)
- Config paths: .wa/ → .ft/, wa.toml → ft.toml, wa.db → ft.db
- Error codes: WA-xxxx → FT-xxxx
- Setup markers: WA-BEGIN/WA-END → FT-BEGIN/FT-END
- Shell hooks: __wa_* → __ft_*
- CI/CD: updated ci.yml, release.yml, all scripts
- Docs: README, AGENTS.md, docs/, install.sh
- All 2815+ unit tests pass

Preserved unchanged:
- Bead IDs (wa-*, bd-*) — immutable identifiers
- wezterm.rs / wezterm_native.rs — external WezTerm interface
- native-wezterm feature flag
- legacy_wezterm/ directory
- Upstream WezTerm references in PROVENANCE.md
- scheme_data.rs wezterm_version metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
